examples: In addition to the gopher-proof beds, we have two large areas protected only from large animals such as javelina.
Across the road is Javelina Leap Vineyards and Winery, named for the wild boar-like animals that roam the Arizona desert.
Hartley hunts all types of hog, from the traditional wild boar to the peccary (also known as javelina or skunk pig), wiry hogs that produce a very distinct-tasting meat.
